description: The ResolutionSettings component is a Settings component.

fields.Fullscreen: Whether or not the game should change to fullscreen mode.
fields.WindowResolution: The resolution in pixels the main window should render at while in windowed mode.
fields.FullscreenResolution: The resolution in pixels the main window should render at while in full screen.
fields.CommitedWindowResolution: The resolution in pixels the main window is currently at while in windowed mode.
fields.CommitedFullscreenResolution: The resolution in pixels the main window is currently at while in full screen.
fields.NeedsToApplyResolution: Whether or not the resolution settings need to be applied.
